name: openviking-memory-no-mcp
description: Long-term semantic memory for Codex, powered by OpenViking, without bundled MCP wiring.

interface.shortDescription: Codex memory plugin without MCP wiring
interface.longDescription: Hooks Codex lifecycle events into OpenViking for recall and capture, but leaves MCP configuration to the user.
defaultPrompt: Use OpenViking memory hooks for long-term recall and capture.
